body.title: Increase HYPOTHESIZE actual cap 2000→4000 chars
body.result: Increased HYPOTHESIZE actual cap 2000→4000 chars; also fixed flaky test_attempt_count_increments_on_replan (ops.run_tests bypass)
body.description: pe_hypothesize truncates basket[actual] to 2000 chars before the Ollama prompt. A 120-line file section averages 4000-6000 chars, so the edit target is routinely cut. Increase to 4000 chars. One-line change in pe_chain.py.
